comments.author: Maria
comments.text: The Grimaldi Lines terminal is at Muelle de San Beltrán — don't go to the main cruise terminal! There's a free shuttle bus from Drassanes metro station.

comments.author: Lars
comments.text: Book the night ferry to Palma — you save a night of accommodation and arrive at 6am ready to explore. Cabins are basic but clean.

comments.author: Tom
comments.text: If you're on foot, take the National Express coach from London Victoria — drops you right at the terminal. Cheaper than the train to Dover Priory + taxi.

comments.author: Eeva
comments.text: There are three different ferry terminals in Helsinki — check which one your ferry uses! Olympia (Silja), Katajanokka (Viking), and West (Tallink). They're spread across the city.

comments.author: Boas
comments.text: The ferry to IJmuiden port leaves from behind the station (north side). Follow the 'Pont' signs. It's free and runs 24/7.
